data.body:
Kyle Manzardo (CLE, First Base) is still 25 but has currently negative career WAR (.228/.301/.431) because a bad start to '26 (-0.5) wiped out his '25 (+0.4 including 27 HR).

Once among the brightest in a loaded Rays system, he was traded for Aaron Civale (now with the A's) in July '23.
